seo.description: Bank statement mortgage programs for self-employed and complex-income borrowers in NY, NJ, FL, PA. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Bank Statement Loans
hero.subheading: Mortgage programs that can use personal or business bank deposits to help document income.

intro.heading: How Bank Statement Loans Work
paragraphs: Searching for bank statement loans near you in New York, New Jersey, Florida, or Pennsylvania? Green Street Capital is a licensed mortgage broker that compares multiple lenders for bank statement loans and related programs — so you are not limited to one bank’s rules.
Bank statement loans are designed for borrowers who have healthy cash flow that is not fully reflected on tax returns. Lenders review deposits over a defined period to estimate qualifying income.
These programs can open doors for entrepreneurs, freelancers, and professionals with complex income—subject to credit, reserves, and property guidelines.
bullets: Business bank statement analysis for owners
Useful when write-offs reduce taxable income

sidebar.heading: Good Fit If…
sidebar.body: You have consistent deposits, manageable debt, and want financing without relying solely on tax-return income.

programs.title: Personal Bank Statement
programs.description: Qualify primarily from personal account deposits.

programs.title: Business Bank Statement
programs.description: Use business accounts with expense factors applied by the lender.

programs.title: P&L Assisted
programs.description: Some lenders combine statements with profit-and-loss documentation.

programs.title: Asset-Based Paths
programs.description: In select cases, asset depletion or other Non-QM tools may apply.

faqs.question: Are rates the same as conventional loans?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies by program, credit, LTV, and reserves. We compare options so you understand tradeoffs.

faqs.question: Can first-time buyers use bank statement loans?
faqs.answer: Sometimes, if the program and property type allow. Eligibility is case-by-case.

faqs.question: Are bank statement loans available in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital helps eligible borrowers explore bank statement loans in New York (including NYC and surrounding areas) as a licensed mortgage broker. NMLS #2066586.

faqs.question: Can I get bank statement loans in New Jersey or Florida?
faqs.answer: Often yes where licensed and program guidelines allow. We serve NY, NJ, FL, and PA — ask about bank statement loans for your state.

faqs.question: How do I apply for bank statement loans?
faqs.answer: Schedule a free consultation or choose a loan officer on our Team page. We will review income, credit, property, and program fit.

faqs.question: What credit score do I need for bank statement loans?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by lender and program. We review your full profile — credit is only one factor alongside income, reserves, and property type.

cta.heading: See if a bank statement loan fits
cta.body: Connect with our team for a confidential review of your deposit history and goals.
